title: Charred Duck Casserole
description: A hearty, savory dish featuring tender duck, charred vegetables, and a rich French-inspired sauce.

ingredients.name: Charred bell peppers
ingredients.notes: Charred over an open flame or in the oven

instructions: Season the duck breast with salt, pepper, and French thyme.
Heat the olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Sear the duck breast until browned on both sides, then transfer to a baking dish.
Add the charred bell peppers, French onion soup mix, and garlic to the skillet. Cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add the red wine to the skillet, scraping up any browned bits. Bring to a simmer and cook until reduced by half.
Arrange the casserole potatoes around the duck breast in the baking dish.
Pour the wine and pepper mixture over the potatoes.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Let rest for 5-10 minutes before serving.
